creative_premise: A living organism in Pressure Garden can be converted into a deterministic pressed botanical SVG before the temporary ecology disappears.
properties: The same genome and parent pair always produce byte-identical SVG text.
The specimen contains visible genome traits and optional parent seeds only.
The SVG is self-contained and contains no script, external link, visit history, account data, or project operations metadata.
Pressing is disabled until a plant exists and composting removes eligibility.

verification.environment: Node.js v22 isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files
verification.github_actions: No workflow run was returned for commit 14b6c060e6658face00e579664a5c4eac1dc22c7 at inspection time.
verification.deployment: No new Pages deployment identity or browser/mobile execution was observed; none is claimed.

independence: This is a finite botanical fiction and take-away artwork, not an explanation of Mirror Cartographer, a research portal, an operations dashboard, or a conversion funnel.
rollback: Revert commits 07157466d480f42c96a7659e4edffc1f20f71478, 32813526fe5f4940b03579862ea6c0d4b09a844c, 89b62da3a2a270b500966363996fc1b5bb0499b4, and 14b6c060e6658face00e579664a5c4eac1dc22c7 without deleting history.
